---
title: "class 12"
author: "Patrick Nguyen (ID: A17680785)"
format: pdf
---

How many samples do we have?

```{r}
exp <- read.table("rs8067378_ENSG00000172057.6.txt")
head(exp)
```

```{r}
nrow(exp)
```

```{r}
table(exp$geno)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
```


Boxplot

```{r}
ggplot(exp) + aes(geno, exp, fill=geno) +
  geom_boxplot(notch=TRUE)
```
